title: Week 4 Overview
html:
Week 4 Overview

You will learn 19 new kanji, and learn how to use past tense for conversations you have learned so far.

Day 16
1. How to compare things
2. How to ask what is better/more etc. than something else
3. Using several adjectives to describe one noun in the same sentence
4. First 13 kanji (山, 月, 木, 一, 二, 三, 四, 五, 六, 七, 八, 九, 十)

Day 17
1. Grammar focus on how to use adjectives and nouns in the past
2. Grammar focus on how to express quantity with verbs
3. Express actions from a starting point to a destination
4. Grammar focus on the particles から、まで、ぐらい
5. Asking detailed questions about an interval of time (なんぷん, なんじかん, なんにち, なんしゅうかん, なんかげつ, なんねん)
6. Using classifiers to talk about a period of time ( －ぷん,－じかん,－にち,－しゅうかん,－かげつ,－ねん)
7. Katakana for sports

Day 18 
1. Grammar focus on using adjectives and nouns in the past negative form
2. 3 more kanji (日, 本, 人)

Day 19
1. Express a need for something (ほしいです）
2. Express something you would like to do
3. Katakana for vehicles

Day 20
1. Express movement to, from a place
2. Grammar focus on the particles に, なに, だれ, どこ＋か
3. 3 more kanji (先, 生, 学)
